name: chain_we_launched_a_7_figure_amazon_brand_on_t
method:
We launched a 7 figure Amazon brand on tiktok shop and did $20k with human UGC creators this week

Good team and good systems >

Takeaway:

- launch with human UGC. We use plug and play method to conn

stages.task: Scrape TikTok Shop trending products for brands doing $5K+/week GMV without visible creator programs
Scrape TikTok creator marketplace and hashtags for creators with 10K+ followers posting product content, filter by engagement rate >3%
Score brand-creator matches by niche overlap, audience size ratio, engagement, and estimated GMV lift. Output top 20 matches.

Generate personalized cold outreach for brands (value prop: we bring you tested creators, commission-only risk) and creators (value prop: we connect you to brands, no upfront cost). Queue to outreach pipeline.
